projectDescription: Pratyay Banerjee's Google Summer of Code 2023 journey with TensorFlow, building an interactive touchless ATM web demo powered by MediaPipe Hand Landmarker for contactless gesture-based interactions.
keyFeatures: Contactless gesture-based ATM interaction using MediaPipe Hand Landmarker
Real-time detection of 21 hand landmarks via webcam feed
Four custom gestures: HOVER, CLICK, UNDO, and GRAB
React + Redux state management for gesture-driven UI updates
Offline PWA support via Workbox service worker and precaching
Custom ML gesture classifier built with MediaPipe Model Maker
GDPR-compliant client-side inference (no data leaves the device)
publicApiSurface: allGesture.js — gesture detection logic (HOVER, CLICK, UNDO, GRAB, BACKSPACE)
Kernel.jsx — core hand landmark processing and gesture dispatch
gesture Redux store — state management for hand gestures and finger coordinates
service-worker.js — offline caching with Workbox stale-while-revalidate strategy
